action_items.action: ADD PRODUCT SYNC AGENDA POINTS NOW — Chloe Christie posted in #core-product at 10:47 BST: '@here please add your points for tomorrow's product sync.' The Confluence agenda page for 06/05/2026 is live. Mike has not yet added his points. Suggested items: GDCU-8619 blocker escalation (Day 20), WC ticket prioritisation (GDCU-8935 assigned to absent Miguel), Vic Dadson return and data eng reqs, GDCU-8895 US sitemap sign-off, GDCU-8787 carousel banner decision. Do this before EOD.

STILL OUTSTANDING — Reply to Jessica Dordevic re GDCU-8928 IUJ Banners. No message from Jessica today — the decision she asked for on 30/04 (sign-off on banners before she checks with Ciara) is still unresolved as of this afternoon. GDCU-8546 Tinder also still shows 'In Progress' at 10:59 despite Chloe expecting it to close. DM Jessica now to get both items resolved before EOD.

ESCALATE NOW — GDCU-8619 Operator List Redesign is now Day 20 Blocked (since 16/04/2026). No movement today. Chloe flagged on 29/04 it is 'beholden to Michael B (Butlin).' No contact from Michael Butlin today. Escalate directly to Colin Brannigan this afternoon to unblock — this has now crossed three weeks and is the single largest stall on the board.

SIGN OFF — GDCU-8895 Prediction Market Page Not on US Sitemap (Sanja Budic, High, In Product — Day 4, since 01/05). No change since this morning. Colin Brannigan is a stakeholder. Review and approve today to keep sprint velocity up and avoid it ageing over another day.

VIC DADSON — Still no Slack activity from Vic today (last seen 23/04). If the check-in call happened this morning it was not visible in Slack. Confirm Vic is back and has context on her open items. GDCU-8935 World Cup Predictor Game was created today and assigned to Miguel Migneco (who is also off today) — Vic's data engineering discussion with Nemanja is overdue and needs scheduling this week.

DESIGN DECISION STILL NEEDED — GDCU-8787 Carousel Banner Shortcode. Joshua Smith posted in #gdc-product-design-pod on 01/05 with two options (A: reuse Simple Banner + arrows; B: Free Games banner style). No resolution visible today. Decision is now 4 days overdue. Reply in #gdc-product-design-pod or DM Joshua to unblock design progress.

NEW IN PRODUCT — GDCU-8611 Update 'Feature' Tag (Novica Vukobratovic, Low, moved to In Product at 10:44 today). Not in morning report. Novica implemented updated Feature/Opinion article tag styling per Figma design (Joshua Smith). Mike is a named stakeholder. Review is quick — check tag renders correctly across news listing, article, and category pages. Approve to keep Novica moving.

SIGN OFF — GDCU-8736 Learning Hub Imagery (Ciara Carroll, Medium, In Product — Day 8, since 28/04). No movement today. Approving this unblocks Carlos Blauth on GDCU-8733 (Apply Feedback to Learning Hub). Clarify with Ciara whether any remaining feedback from Chloe's 'back and forth' note on 30/04 is resolved before approving.

WORLD CUP — GDCU-8935 World Cup Predictor Game ticket created and updated today, currently Backlog, assigned to Miguel Migneco (OFF today). Mike flagged on 29/04 that WC items (FTP game, Cosmo reskin, Group Bets) need prioritising now. With Miguel absent, confirm the ticket scope and get it onto the sprint — add to tomorrow's product sync agenda.

TINDER STALL — GDCU-8546 Tinder Style Offer Match (Jessica Dordevic) updated at 10:59 today but still 'In Progress' — not moved to 'In Product' as Chloe expected at sprint close 30/04. Jessica has not messaged Mike today. Chase Jessica this afternoon on whether it is ready to move and what is blocking sign-off.

FOLLOW UP — GDCU-8879 Genesis Brand Carousel Component Card (Jessica Dordevic). Bounced from In Product on 29/04 (Chloe: confirm logo name/size from Origins). Not in today's sprint activity — status unclear. With Miguel absent (no coverage on related GDCU-8813 Ace Navigation UI Audit), check with Jessica on current state.

DM GABRIEL — Intake form questions from 23/04 remain unresolved. No message from Gabriel today. His two suggestions (SEO/IA for new pages; operator offer attributes to display) are still outstanding. Update the intake form and share with Gabriel before EOD or add as a product sync agenda point for tomorrow.

POSITIVE — 3 tickets closed today: GDCU-7363 (Slots Widget Filter bug — Novica, Done 11:30), GDCU-8854 (Geo Selector arrow collapse — Harden, Done 10:30), GDCU-8912 (Cosmo Spins rotate message on desktop — Harden, Done 10:27). Cosmo Spins fix is live — Mike is a stakeholder. Verify on production if required.

CREATIVE DIRECTION — GDCU-8846 Cosmo Spins Spring Ad Campaign (Ciara Carroll, To Do). Carried from previous sprint. Josh Kerr feedback: needs rethinking — clearer message, less 'gaming' feel. Ciara managing four tickets (GDCU-8619, GDCU-8736, GDCU-8947, GDCU-8846). Provide creative direction so she can proceed when capacity frees.

MONITOR — GDCU-8947 Cosmo Cash Machine Images (Ciara Carroll, In Progress). Created 01/05. Scope: article image, hero, fonts, coming soon and email images for Jackpot £5,000 draw. No new updates today. No action needed — watch for In Product movement.
